'''ngakocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psalmodist|psalmodist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psalmodist|psalmodist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngakocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngækecheth|ngækecheth]] || [[word:ngækechej|ngækechej]] || [[word:ngækechesh|ngækechesh]] || [[word:ngækeche|ngækeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakokochoth|ngakokochoth]] || [[word:ngakokochoj|ngakokochoj]] || [[word:ngakokochosh|ngakokochosh]] || [[word:ngakokocho|ngakokocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakochoth|ngakochoth]] || [[word:ngakochoj|ngakochoj]] || [[word:ngakochosh|ngakochosh]] || [[word:ngakocho|ngakocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakofchoth|ngakofchoth]] || [[word:ngakofchoj|ngakofchoj]] || [[word:ngakofchosh|ngakofchosh]] || [[word:ngakofchof|ngakofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngakochotho|ngakochotho]] || [[word:ngakochojo|ngakochojo]] || [[word:ngakochosho|ngakochosho]] || [[word:ngakochoko|ngakochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngakochoth|ngakochoth]] || [[word:ngakochoj|ngakochoj]] || [[word:ngakochosh|ngakochosh]] || [[word:ngakocho|ngakocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngakochothol|ngakochothol]] || [[word:ngakochojol|ngakochojol]] || [[word:ngakochoshol|ngakochoshol]] || [[word:ngakochokol|ngakochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngakochothotho|ngakochothotho]] || [[word:ngakochojojo|ngakochojojo]] || [[word:ngakochoshosho|ngakochoshosho]] || [[word:ngakochoko|ngakochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngakochothon|ngakochothon]] || [[word:ngakochojon|ngakochojon]] || [[word:ngakochoshon|ngakochoshon]] || [[word:ngakochokon|ngakochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngakochothoro|ngakochothoro]] || [[word:ngakochojoro|ngakochojoro]] || [[word:ngakochoshoro|ngakochoshoro]] || [[word:ngakochokoro|ngakochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
